mapper.select:
/* SITE_STATS_Dao_retrieveVisitrCntByDt */ SELECT
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM') AS dt,
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM.dd') AS dt,
count(login_dttm) AS cnt FROM th_sc_intn_usr_login WHERE
sys_div_cd = #{sysDivCd}
sys_div_cd = 'ECS'
AND login_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) || '01 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '01'), 'yyyyMMdd') || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND login_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 8) || ' 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 8) || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND etc_nm = 'success' GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM')
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM.dd')
ORDER BY cnt DESC

/* SITE_STATS_Dao_retrieveVisitrCntByDt */ SELECT dept_nm, ROUND(cnt / SUM(cnt) OVER(PARTITION BY NULL) * 100, 2) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT dept_nm, cnt FROM ( SELECT
dept_nm, count(dept_nm) AS cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NULL ORDER BY count(dept_nm) DESC, dept_nm) AS rn FROM th_sc_intn_usr_login WHERE
sys_div_cd = #{sysDivCd}
sys_div_cd = 'ECS'
AND login_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) || '01 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '01'), 'yyyyMMdd') || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND login_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 8) || ' 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 8) || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND etc_nm = 'success' GROUP BY
dept_nm ORDER BY rn ) WHERE rn <= 10 ) ORDER BY cnt DESC

/* SITE_STATS_Dao_retrieveMtYyVisitrCntByDt */ SELECT
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy') AS dt,
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM') AS dt,
count(login_dttm) AS cnt FROM th_sc_intn_usr_login WHERE
sys_div_cd = #{sysDivCd}
sys_div_cd = 'ECS'
AND login_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - 5 || SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 5, 2) || '01 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '01'), 'yyyyMMdd') || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND login_dttm BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 8) || ' 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS'), -12) AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 8) || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND etc_nm = 'success' GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy')
TO_CHAR(login_dttm, 'yyyy.MM')
ORDER BY dt

/* SITE_STATS_Dao_retrieveVisitrCntByMenu */ SELECT menu_id, ( SELECT menu_nm FROM th_sc_menu_mapng WHERE sys_div_cd = A.sys_div_cd AND menu_id = A.menu_id ) AS menu_nm, count(menu_id) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT MAX(sys_div_cd) AS sys_div_cd, menu_id, conctr_id,
TO_CHAR(conect_dttm, 'yyyy.MM') AS dt
TO_CHAR(conect_dttm, 'yyyy.MM.dd') AS dt
FROM th_sc_intn_menu_conect WHERE
sys_div_cd = #{sysDivCd}
sys_div_cd = 'ECS'
AND conect_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) || '01 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '01'), 'yyyyMMdd') || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND conect_dttm BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 8) || ' 00:00:00', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 8) || ' 23:59:59', 'yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY conctr_id, menu_id,
TO_CHAR(conect_dttm, 'yyyy.MM')
TO_CHAR(conect_dttm, 'yyyy.MM.dd')
) A GROUP BY sys_div_cd, menu_id ORDER BY cnt DESC
